title: alangium barbatum subsp. decipiens
intro: Alangium barbatum subsp. decipiens, also known as the Thai alangium, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique, fragrant flowers and edible fruits. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Alangium barbatum subsp. decipiens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and skin infections.
